name: wa_revive_maskhit
drl: rule W when accumulate( E($v : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): windowed sum($v:val): a window-EVICTED member's mask-HIT update ({val} in the bindings-only mask) re-ASSERTS it into the fold at LIVE fields (10->0 at eviction, 20 at revival). BetaNode.modifyObject: absent RightTuple + mask intersect -> assert.
